home.heroTitle: Capture precious moments with your child — <highlight>record lightly</highlight> and revisit anytime.
home.heroDescription: Briefly log activities done with your child at home, and easily revisit them when you want.
home.howItWorksSub: Choose an activity, briefly record, and check the recent progress.
home.step1Desc: Pick an activity to try with your child and start recording.
home.step2Desc: Ask questions, observe, and connect joyfully with your child.
home.step3Desc: Calmly check your child's growth through the records.
home.examplesSub: Simple questions ideal for conversation and recording.
home.privacyDesc: IBNote is designed to let you record without sensitive information like real names or school names. All records are safely tied to your logged-in account only.
home.privacyCaption: Data is securely protected and will not be exposed to anyone else.
home.ctaTitle: Log in and start activity today.
home.ctaDesc: Jump right into IBNote's loop: choosing activities, leaving records, and reviewing them.
home.footer: © 2026 IBNote. Capturing and revisiting children's growth for parents.

auth.welcomeTitle: Welcome back for your child's records.
auth.welcomeDesc: Log in to view past records and recent summaries, and continue recording new activities.
auth.welcomeNote: Upon logging in, you'll be directed to the <highlight>{pathName}</highlight> screen.

errors.wrongCredentials: Email or password do not match. Please try again.
errors.emailInUse: This email is already in use. Please sign in or use a different email.
errors.weakPassword: Password should be at least 6 characters.
errors.default: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
errors.emptyFields: Please enter both email and password.

editor.guidanceDesc: This record is solely for you and your child. It doesn't have to be perfect sentences. Start by jotting down the most memorable fragment that comes to mind.
editor.privacyNote: Do not enter real names, school names, or other sensitive personal info.
editor.childReactionPlaceholder: What did your child realize for the first time? (e.g., They said the sand feels cold)
editor.parentMemoPlaceholder: How did you feel while watching your child?
editor.tip1: Note how long your child's gaze lingered. (Focus & Stillness)
editor.tip2: It's good to record their reaction when facing unexpected difficulties.
editor.tip3: Recall how your child invited you into that moment.
editor.growthObservationDesc: What developmental process did your child go through today? Choose the appropriate level for each competency.

records.heroDesc: Conversations and small discoveries are all important pieces of your child's growth. Look back at saved moments or continue writing from where you left off.
records.emptyStateFiltersTitle: No records match the selected filters.
records.emptyStateFiltersDesc: Try changing or resetting the filters.
records.emptyStateDesc: Decorate the first page with a new record.
records.errorLoadDesc: A problem occurred while retrieving records
records.redirectLoginDesc: You must be logged in to view your records

summary.loadingDesc: Checking login status to show records submitted within the last 14 days.
summary.calcDesc: Converting activity dates and competency ratings into an easy-to-understand 14-day summary.
summary.emptyTitle: No records submitted in the last 14 days.
summary.emptyDesc: The current summary period is {range}. When you submit records in this period, competency counts and average grades will appear here.
summary.emptyHint1Title: If you already have a draft
summary.emptyHint1Desc: Continue editing it in your records and submit. Drafts are not included in the summary.
summary.emptyHint2Title: If this is your first time
summary.emptyHint2Desc: Pick an activity from the templates and record it. It will automatically reflect here when submitted.
summary.overviewTitle: A quick look at your submissions over the last 14 days.
summary.overviewDesc: We aggregate only records submitted between {range}. View your activity volume and competency evaluation trends on one screen.
summary.statTotalRecordsDesc: Counts only submissions in the last 14 days.
summary.statAvgCompsDesc: Average is calculated only for rated competencies.
summary.statRecentSummaryDesc: Shows the most recent submissions by activity date.
summary.basisTitle: Understand the basis of this summary.
summary.basisDesc: This summary is based on {count} records submitted within {range}.
summary.basisCard1Desc: Only records completely submitted within the period are grouped.
summary.basisCard2Desc: Drafts are not included until they are marked as submitted.
summary.basisCard3Desc: You can open recent submissions below, then return to the records screen to follow the narrative.
summary.compCountTitle: See which competencies you recorded most.
summary.compCountDesc: Each competency is counted once per submitted record.
summary.compAvgTitle: View average grades per competency at a glance.
summary.compAvgDesc: Grades A-E are converted to scores to calculate the average.
summary.avgGradeEmpty: No evaluations submitted for this competency in the last 14 days.
summary.recentRecordsTitle: Revisit recent records reflected in this summary.
summary.recentRecordsDesc: Displaying up to 5 entries, sorted by most recent activity date.

labels.basisCard1Desc: Only records with 'Submitted' status in the period are included.
labels.basisCard2Desc: Scores from A(5) to E(1) are averaged for each competency.
labels.basisCard3Desc: Summaries are updated immediately upon new record submission.

settings.loadingDesc: Checking login status to display data linked to this account and management options.
settings.accountInfoDesc: IBNote only supports Email/Password login. You can only manage records linked to this account here.
settings.dataOwnershipDesc: Records and summaries are strictly tied to the logged-in account. Logging in with a different account will hide these records.
settings.deleteRecordsDesc: Deletes all record data saved in the current account. This only deletes data, keeping you logged in.
settings.deleteRecordsConfirm: Delete all records saved to this account? This action cannot be undone.
settings.deleteRecordsHelper: After deletion, your records and recent summary will appear empty.
settings.deleteRecordsSuccess: Successfully deleted record data. Views should now be empty.
settings.deleteRecordsError: Could not delete record data. Please try again later.
settings.logoutDesc: Ends current session and returns to the home page. Your data is not deleted.
settings.logoutConfirm: Log out from current account? Your saved records will not be deleted.
settings.logoutHelper: Accessing protected screens after logging out will redirect to the login screen.
settings.logoutError: Could not log out. Please try again later.
settings.nextMoveDesc: Records and summaries run purely based on the current logged-in account.

hero.title: Start a Conversation with Your Child
hero.desc: Pick an activity and quickly jot down a record. These small moments will beautifully showcase your child's growth.

guidance.title: One moment is all you need.
guidance.desc: You don't need to do everything. Focus on the one conversation you want to have with your child today.

library.redirectDesc: Only logged-in users can access the template library.
library.emptyDesc: Please try a different search term or filter.

detail.redirectDesc: You will be redirected back to the activity details.
detail.quickDecisionTitle: Is this activity right for us?

resetPassword.notFound: If we can send instructions to this email, you will receive them shortly. Please check your inbox and spam folder.
resetPassword.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please try again later.
resetPassword.networkError: Please check your network connection and try again.
resetPassword.defaultError: Failed to send reset instructions. Please try again later.
resetPassword.title:
We will guide you back
for your precious connections.
resetPassword.desc: It's okay if you forgot your password. Calmly enter your email, and we'll send you a secure link to log back in. We will help you continue recording moments with your child.
resetPassword.formDesc: Please enter your registered email address.
resetPassword.statusSuccessDesc: We have sent instructions to {email}. Please follow the link in the email to change your password.

transition.invalidDesc: The URL is incorrect or the activity is still in preparation.
transition.prepareSpaceDesc: Preparing a space to record your child's precious growth
transition.checkLoginDesc: Moving to the record space after login
transition.guidance: Focus on the scene you experienced today rather than the record itself. Leaving a short note of how you felt is enough.
transition.errorDefault: An error occurred while preparing the recording space.

hero.title: Your Reflection Journey
hero.desc: Conversations and small findings are important pieces of your child's growth. Revisit saved moments or pick up where you left off.

empty.noFiltersDesc: Add a new record to decorate your first page.
empty.hasFiltersTitle: No records match the selected conditions.
empty.hasFiltersDesc: Try changing the filter or resetting it.

redirect.errorDesc: An error occurred while fetching records
redirect.loginDesc: Login is required to view your records

guidance.title: Take your time.
guidance.desc: This record is solely for you and your child. Perfect sentences aren't needed. Start with the most memorable piece of the scene that comes to mind.

scene.title: Scene Capture
scene.privacy: Please do not enter real names, school names, or other sensitive personal information.
scene.childPlaceholder: What did they realize for the first time? (e.g. They said the sand felt cold)
scene.parentPlaceholder: What did you feel while watching your child?

tips.title: Reflection Tips
tips.tip1: Note how long your child focused on one thing. (Focus & Stillness)
tips.tip2: It's good to record their reactions when facing unexpected difficulties.
tips.tip3: Recall how your child invited you into that moment.

growth.title: Growth Observation
growth.desc: What developmental milestones were achieved today? Select the most appropriate competency rating.

state.missingError: Record data could not be found.

metadata.title: IBNote
metadata.description: A reflection tool for parents to record and revisit activities with their children at home.

errors.timeout: The response for {module} is delayed. Please try again later.
errors.fetch: An error occurred while fetching {module} data. Please try again later.
errors.save: An error occurred while saving the record. Please try again later.
errors.authOnly: You can only save records when logged in.
errors.noRevert: Submitted records cannot be reverted to drafts.
errors.reqDate: Activity date is required for submission.
errors.reqRating: At least one competency rating is required for submission.
errors.missingRecord: Record data could not be found.
